title: Blade Crunch Delight
description: A unique fusion of flavors and textures with midnight crunch. Enjoy!
instructions: 1. Melt the chocolate chips in a microwave-safe bowl in 30-second increments, stirring between each interval.
2. Once melted, stir in the crunchy caramel sauce until well combined.
3. Dip each blade-shaped pretzel into the melted chocolate mixture, coating about 2/3 of the pretzel.
4. Place the coated pretzels on a parchment-lined baking sheet.
5. Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the chocolate to set.
